event_blocks.summary: The film 'Снежная Королева' (The Snow Queen) by 'Союзмультфильм' studio, released in Moscow in 1957, opens with a black screen transitioning to a dark reddish-brown background displaying white Cyrillic text and a dramatic, sweeping orchestral score. The production credits begin with H.C. Andersen as the author, followed by screenwriters G. Grebner, L. Atamanov, and N. Erdman; poet N. Zabolotsky; and lyricist M. Svetlov, accompanied by swelling orchestral music. Director L. Atamanov, art directors N. Fedorov and I. Sharzman, cinematographer M. Druian, and composer A. Aivazyan are then credited, with the score maintaining its epic quality. Sound engineer N. Prilutsky and editor L. Kyakht are shown, followed by a comprehensive list of animators including F. Khitruk, E. Khudova, K. Chikin, R. Mirenkova, T. Fedorova, V. Krumin, L. Rezцova, V. Likhachev, I. Podgorsky, V. Dolgikh, E. Komova, and G. Novozhilov. Assistant animators B. Korneev, L. Model, and A. Dudnikov, assistant directors V. Shilina, L. Goryacheva, and N. Orlova, assistant cameramen N. Klimova and E. Rizo, and background artists I. Svetlich, O. Gimmerling, P. Korobayev, and D. Anpilov are also credited. The film’s director R. Ivanov is then credited, and finally, the voice actors are listed with their roles: V. Gribov as Ole-Lukoye, Y. Zheimo as Gerda, A. Komolova as Kay, M. Babanova as the Snow Queen, and G. Kozhakina as the Little Robber Girl. Throughout these sequential credits, the background remains a consistently dark and icy stylized backdrop, evoking a classic Soviet animation aesthetic, all underscored by the continuous, powerful orchestral music.

event_blocks.summary: An orchestral, mysterious, and whimsical score plays over a title card crediting voice actors В. Грибков, Я. Жеймо, А. Комолова, М. Бабанова, and Г. Кожакина against a cracked ice background. The scene shifts to a close-up of an ornate book, 'Сказки и истории' by Г. Х. Андерсен, from which a small, animated gnome-like character (Гном-персонаж) with a red hat, white hair, red coat, and green tunic emerges. The gnome grunts and strains while climbing down the book, exclaiming "Погодите, погодите!" before picking up a small white umbrella with a blue handle. As the gnome walks determinedly along the book's spine, a voice announces "Первый зонтик!" and "Второй!" accompanied by more grunts. A sudden "Ой!" from the gnome is followed by a magical whoosh and chime. After a brief "Да," and chuckles, the gnome, now upright and holding the umbrella, addresses the viewer with a friendly "А теперь здравствуйте. Я очень рад вас видеть." The scene then transitions to a dimly lit, shadowy study with mysterious, whimsical music. The Гном-персонаж climbs down a bookshelf, picks up the umbrella, and walks along a book's spine. Addressing "Hans Christian Andersen, friend of children all over the world," the gnome states that "birds, flowers, chairs, and even this old cabinet" (referencing furniture like a grandfather clock, wooden table with candelabra, and an open book in the Комната с мебелью) told Andersen their stories. The gnome sits atop the pedestal of a dark Статуя мужчины, smiling and gesturing, revealing that Andersen learned many stories from him and acknowledged, "No one in the world knows as many fairy tales as Ole Lukøje." Exclaiming "Yes!", the gnome stands triumphantly, removes his hat to reveal a bald head with white sideburns, and joyfully introduces himself as "Ole Lukøje," adding with a mischievous chuckle that ancient people called him the "God of Dreams," before humbly concluding, "I'm just a little magical man." The low, dramatic lighting throughout enhances the mysterious and whimsical tone.

Гном-персонаж.description: Small animated gnome-like character with a red hat, white hair, red coat, and green tunic, who climbs down a book, picks up a small white umbrella with a blue handle, and walks along the book’s spine with a determined expression. He is the speaker, introducing himself in a theatrical, somewhat high-pitched Russian voice as Ole Lukøje, a 'little magical man' who knows many fairy tales. He also reveals that ancient people called him the 'God of Dreams,' often chuckling mischievously. He later sits atop a statue’s pedestal, removes his hat to reveal a bald head with white sideburns, and gestures joyfully with open arms.

event_blocks.summary: The Гном-персонаж, initially distressed and clutching his head on a dark surface, reacts to a calm male Russian narration about tiptoeing up to children and blowing on the back of their heads to induce sleep, accompanied by a gentle blowing sound and a soft "shhh." The gnome then expresses surprise, raises his hands, picks up a closed Зонт с узором сердечек и листьев in the dimly lit Комната с мебелью, and opens it with a flourish as the narrator describes opening the umbrella. The gnome begins to dance joyfully, twirling the umbrella as the narrator specifies it's for "good, sweet children" and demonstrates spinning it. The gnome closes the umbrella, places it down, and gestures excitedly, celebrating the narrator's conclusion that children will "dream fascinating fairy tales all night long," with the low lighting and sharp shadows enhancing the gnome's emotional arc mirroring the soothing narrative.

raw_segments: The scene opens with a small, gnome-like character, the Гном-персонаж, with a red hat and coat, initially distressed and clutching his head on a dark, shadowy surface. As soft, magical background music begins, a calm male voice narrates in Russian, describing how "in the evenings, when you lay your head on the pillow and cover yourselves with a blanket," he "tiptoes up to each of you and quietly blows on the back of your head," accompanied by a gentle blowing sound. The gnome then shifts to an expression of surprise or realization, raising his hands. The narrator continues, "I'll blow, your little eyes close, and you... fall asleep," with a soft, drawn-out "shhh" sound. The gnome picks up a closed umbrella with colorful heart and leaf patterns, which lies in the dimly lit room with a large dark vase. The narrator states, "Then I open the umbrella," as the gnome opens it with a flourish and begins to dance joyfully, twirling it around with a wide smile. The narrator specifies, "This colorful one, over good, sweet children," and adds, "I start to spin it, like this," as the gnome continues his expressive twirling. The gnome then closes the umbrella, places it down, and gestures with excitement, celebrating as the narrator concludes, "And they dream fascinating fairy tales all night long." The low lighting and sharp shadows emphasize the gnome's internal emotional journey, which visually mirrors the soothing, dream-inducing narrative.

event_blocks.summary: A Гном-персонаж, initially distressed in a dimly lit room and speaking of naughty children falling asleep, transitions to joy, dancing and twirling a black umbrella before enthusiastically opening a Зонт с узором сердечек и листьев, revealing its patterned canopy. As the camera zooms into the umbrella, it transforms into an animated miniature town with red-roofed houses and cobblestone streets, accompanied by a grand, magical orchestral score, with the gnome declaring, "Before you is an ancient city." The scene then shifts to a shadowy view beneath an ornate umbrella revealing this miniature town, transitioning to a whimsical, playful tune as a man in a black coat and top hat walks briskly, startling a plump woman in a blue dress and red apron who exclaims, 'Ой, что я наделала!' and whispers, 'Хорошо, что он не посмотрел вверх.' On a sunlit balcony, two young girls, Gerda and Kai, tend to flower boxes; a black-and-white bird lands, eliciting surprised delight from the girls who exclaim 'Смотри! Смотри!' and giggle before the bird flies away. Gerda, with long blonde hair, waters plants and offers a flower she grew, while Kai, with short blonde hair, presents a potted red rose, and they agree to replant them together, wishing for the flowers to be "inseparable, like us," and "love each other." An off-screen voice calls their names, and as they say goodbye to each other and close the balcony door, the camera zooms out to reveal the quaint town with red-tiled roofs and distant church spires, underscored by soft, warm lighting and gentle, whimsical orchestral music.

raw_segments: The segment opens with the Гном-персонаж, a small gnome-like figure with white hair, a red hat, red coat, and green tunic, appearing distressed in a dimly lit room. A whimsical, slightly melancholic background music plays as the gnome, speaking in a male Russian voice, states, "It is intended for naughty children. I open it, they also fall asleep. But they lie like logs in a shed. And see nothing in their sleep." He clutches a black umbrella, his expression shifting from worry to joy as he begins to dance and twirl the umbrella with enthusiasm. He continues, "But I have no doubt, you are all very nice, sweet, obedient, not bullies, not lazybones! And therefore I will tell you a wonderful fairy tale. Listen and watch!" The scene briefly cuts to black before returning to the gnome, now standing beside a large dark vase adorned with a feather, with a closed patterned umbrella leaning against it. He gestures excitedly, then opens the Зонт с узором сердечек и листьев, revealing its white canopy with colorful heart and leaf patterns. He twirls it joyfully, his movements expressive and lively. As the camera zooms into the umbrella’s pattern, which transitions into a surreal, animated view of a miniature town with red-roofed houses, cobblestone streets, and intricate architectural details, the gnome declares, "Before you is an ancient city." The background music simultaneously transforms into a grand, magical orchestral score, enhancing the dreamlike transformation. The scene ends with a dark, shadowy silhouette of a bridge or gate, hinting at a transition to a new location or narrative phase.

The video opens with a dramatic, melancholic orchestral score as a shadowy view from beneath a large, ornate umbrella reveals a miniature town with red-roofed buildings and cobblestone streets, suggesting a magical transformation. The music then shifts to a whimsical, playful tune as the camera pans across the intricate architecture and warm, golden lighting. A man in a black coat and top hat walks briskly through the streets, holding a closed umbrella with a serious expression. He passes a plump woman in a blue dress and red apron, who is startled by his presence and stumbles backward, exclaiming in Russian, 'Ой, что я наделала!' (Oh, what have I done!) and then whispering, 'Хорошо, что он не посмотрел вверх.' (Good thing he didn't look up.) The scene shifts to a sunlit balcony where two young girls with blonde hair are tending to flower boxes. Amidst bird chirping, a black-and-white bird flies into the frame and lands on the balcony, causing the girls to react with surprise and delight, exclaiming 'Смотри! Смотри!' (Look! Look!) and giggling happily. The bird then flies away, and the girls resume their gardening, their happy chatter and giggles filling the air, transitioning the overall atmosphere from mysterious and shadowy to bright and cheerful, emphasizing a shift from solitude to community and warmth.

The scene opens on a rustic wooden roof corner with a small horn-like adornment, before panning down to a sunlit balcony. Here, a young girl, Gerda, with long blonde hair in a blue blouse and red skirt, is watering plants. She speaks in Russian, saying, "The swallow brought a flower. I also want to make a gift for myself. Here. I grew it for you." Another girl, Kai, with short blonde hair in a dark brown outfit, approaches, carrying a potted red rose. Kai responds, "And this one I grew for you, Gerda." Gerda thanks her, then suggests, "Kai, let's replant them in one pot." Kai agrees, and with shared laughter, they kneel together, gently placing the red rose beside a white one. Gerda expresses their wish for the flowers to be "inseparable, like us," and "friends, like us," and "love each other." Kai echoes, "And let them love each other, like us," to which Gerda affirms. A man's voice calls out "Kai! Gerda!" from off-screen. The girls then stand, and Gerda closes the balcony door. As the camera zooms out to reveal the quaint town with red-tiled roofs and distant church spires, Gerda says, "Goodbye, Gerda," and Kai says, "Goodbye, Kai." The peaceful atmosphere of the miniature village is underscored by the soft, warm lighting and the gentle, whimsical orchestral music that begins to play.

event_blocks.summary: A miniature town with red-tiled roofs and timber-framed houses transitions from a clear sky through gathering dark clouds, rain, and finally heavy snowfall, accompanied by gentle, melancholic music and a Russian male narrator discussing deep love, summer gardens, and the onset of cold winter evenings when 'Kai' would visit and 'her grandmother' would tell stories. Indoors, in a warmly lit room with a decorative fireplace emitting crackling fire and bubbling water sounds, an elderly grandmother with white hair, wearing a red hooded cloak and spectacles, sits knitting in a wooden chair. Beside her, two young blonde girls, one in blue and red, the other in dark brown, observe. A window with snow-covered panes reveals a potted plant with a rose. The grandmother's calm voice asks if they listen well when firewood crackles and it's frosty, remarking, 'Look, it's snowing again, and every snowflake is like a white bee.' One girl excitedly asks, 'Grandma, tell me, where do these white bee-snowflakes fly from?' and the grandmother replies, 'From the far north, from there...'. The scene highlights the contrast between the cold exterior and warm interior as the girls listen, absorbed by the stories and the rhythmic click of knitting needles.

event_blocks.summary: An elderly Старушка, wearing a red hooded cloak and spectacles, calmly knits in a wooden chair while two young Девочки на балконе observe, as a narrator describes "icy winds, blizzards, and fogs" flying in across a cold sea. A sudden, violent burst of snow and ice sweeps across the frame, transforming the domestic setting into a cold, icy landscape, with the narrator revealing that "all of them are loyal servants of the Snow Queen." Amidst dramatic, ominous orchestral music and a deep gong sound, a towering, crystalline Ледяной замок emerges from darkness, illuminated by glowing embers and falling snowflakes. Inside this castle, the Снежная Королева, a regal, pale figure with an angular headdress and icy blue eyes, is seated on her dark throne, described by the narrator as "beautiful" and "all made of dazzling and sparkling ice, yet alive," with eyes that "shine like stars, but have no warmth."

She is soon joined by a white horse-drawn sleigh, pulled by two white horses, which gallops through the village, kicking up snow. A figure in a blue coat rides in the sleigh, appearing to be in pursuit or escape. As the sleigh races past snow-laden houses, the girl's distressed voice is heard crying out, "Куда же ты!" (Where are you going!) and then desperately pleading, "Не надо, Кай! Не надо!" (Don't, Kai! Don't!). The camera follows the sleigh's swift movement as it exits the village and transitions to a darker, forested area under a night sky. The sleigh continues its journey through snow-covered trees, its galloping hooves and sleigh bells echoing through the tense atmosphere. The girl, now in a red dress with a blue collar and brown hood, is seen running frantically, her face showing distress, her cries still resonating. The sleigh disappears into the dense, shadowy woods, emphasizing the urgency and danger of the chase, all set against the backdrop of classic Soviet-era animation and the persistent, dramatic music.

event_blocks.summary: In a dark, snowy forest at night, underscored by dramatic, ominous orchestral music, a white sleigh pulled by two galloping white horses races through the snow. The Снежная Королева, a tall, pale figure in a blue coat and white fur-trimmed cloak, drives the sleigh, pursuing the Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке, who runs desperately through the snow. After the boy stumbles and falls, the Queen lifts him into the sleigh with a cold, emotionless gesture. She menacingly asks, "Так ты хотел посадить меня на горячую печку? Ну ты совсем замёрз?" The frightened boy clutches his hands as the Queen says, "Ну иди ко мне. Всё ещё мёрзнешь?" The distressed boy cries out, "Мне холодно! И больно! Отпусти!" The Queen chillingly replies, "Больше не буду тебя целовать." The orchestral music intensifies as the sleigh speeds through the icy forest, passing glistening, snow-laden trees. The sleigh speeds away into the darkness with the boy trapped in the Queen’s grasp, his fate uncertain, as the powerful music fades slightly but maintains its intensity.

И больно! Отпусти!"

The Снежная Королева, a tall, pale figure in a blue coat and white fur-trimmed cloak, drives the sleigh, pursuing a small boy, the Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке, who runs desperately through the snow. As the boy stumbles and falls, the Queen reaches down with a cold, emotionless gesture, lifting him into the sleigh. She speaks to him with a calm yet menacing tone, asking, "Так ты хотел посадить меня на горячую печку?" (So you wanted to put me on a hot stove?) and then, "Ну ты совсем замёрз?" (Well, are you completely frozen?). The boy, visibly frightened, clutches his hands together as he is held. The Queen continues, "Ну иди ко мне." (Well, come to me.) and "Всё ещё мёрзнешь?" The Queen responds chillingly, "Больше не буду тебя целовать." (I won't kiss you anymore.). event_blocks.summary: The Снежная Королева, a tall, pale figure in a blue coat with white fur trim, rides swiftly in a white sleigh pulled by two galloping white horses over icy terrain through a dark, snowy forest at night, underscored by ominous, magical orchestral music, sleigh bells, and the thudding of galloping horses. She captures the frightened Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке, holding him tightly as she speaks in a cold, echoing voice, "Доверься мне, мой мальчик. Мы отсюда умчимся в удивительное царство. Попав туда, ты обо всём забудешь. Холодной льдинкой сделается сердце. Не будет в нём ни радости, ни горя. Но лишь покой и холод. Это счастье." The sleigh then soars through a starry night sky, the boy looking up in awe and fear as the stars swirl around them, while the ethereal orchestral music continues. The scene transitions to a close-up of a large, ornate book titled 'Сказки и истории' by Г. Х. Андерсен, from which emerges the Гном-персонаж. The music shifts to a whimsical, almost circus-like tune as the small gnome-like figure, initially crying with a handkerchief, transitions to joyfully singing or speaking with expressive vocalizations, twirling a white umbrella with heart and leaf patterns. The final shot reveals a dimly lit Комната с мебелью with a dark, life-sized Статуя мужчины, a large dark vase, and a closed зонт с узором сердечек и листьев, as the music becomes more melancholic and a faint, almost whispered "Прошла" is heard, marking a narrative transition.

raw_segments: The segment opens in a dimly lit room where a small, animated gnome-like character, with white hair, a red hat, red coat, and green tunic, initially appears distressed, wiping his eyes with a handkerchief. He then transitions to a joyful expression, gesturing animatedly as he narrates in a storytelling male voice, describing how "Winter came. But Kai did not return. Little Gerda waited for him in vain." He continues, explaining that "when spring finally came, Gerda put on her best scarves and new red shoes, kissed her sleeping grandmother, and set off in search of Kai," emphasizing her as "brave, little Gerda." The gnome stands beside a large dark vase with a feathered adornment and a closed umbrella with heart and leaf patterns, which remain static. The scene then transitions to a bright, open field where the young girl, Gerda, with blonde hair and wearing a red dress with a blue bodice and white sleeves, walks through a meadow of white flowers, accompanied by orchestral music that begins to swell. Birds fly overhead, and a distant city skyline is visible. Gerda pauses, looks around, and continues walking along a dirt path where she encounters a small, playful lamb. She is heard asking in a questioning voice, "Please tell me, do you know where my brother Kai is?" to which multiple high-pitched, bird-like voices respond, "We don't know, we don't know, we don't know, we don't know!" Gerda then asks the lamb, "Maybe you know where Kai is?" The lamb, in a high-pitched, squeaky voice, humorously replies, "I don't know! I was just born!" The lamb hops and runs ahead, leading Gerda toward a riverbank where a wooden boat rests under a weeping willow tree. Gerda approaches the boat, placing her hands on her chest in a gesture of wonder or emotion, and is heard addressing the river, "River... River, tell me, maybe... maybe Kai..." as the scene ends with a soft, pastoral atmosphere, gentle flowing water sounds, and the continuing orchestral music.

Under a soft, hazy sky, a serene riverbank with a weeping willow sets the scene as a small wooden boat rests on the shore. A girl, dressed in a red skirt, white sleeves, and dark blue vest, approaches with wonder. She picks up a red leather shoe, declaring in Russian, "Here are my new shoes. Take them, I don't mind. Just tell me where Kai is." As gentle, slightly melancholic orchestral music plays, she places the shoe into the boat, asking, "Don't you want my gift? It can't be that you don't know. Please, take it!" With deliberate motion, she unties the rope and steps into the boat, pushing off into the calm water. Her blonde hair flows as she rows gently, gliding down the river under the willow's branches, while birds, including swallows, fly overhead. The music becomes more hopeful and determined as she exclaims, "Thank you! Are you taking me to Kai?" The boat moves deeper into a lush, green riverside landscape, and the music grows dramatic and adventurous. The girl stands up, arms outstretched, as if embracing the natural beauty, speaking rapidly and excitedly, almost in a chant or plea, as the orchestral intensity builds.

event_blocks.summary: A girl in a red skirt and blue vest, the Девочка, unties a boat from under a weeping willow by a calm river and rows away, her departure marked by birds flying overhead and the sound of whimsical, brass-heavy orchestral music. She approaches a sunlit riverside estate with a white stone wall and an ivy-adorned gate, where two Гвардейцы в белых мундирах, holding brass instruments, stand at attention. The Девочка exclaims "Солдатики!" and "Замолчите!" seemingly in response to their toy-like music, before disembarking to be greeted by a tall woman in a black coat and wide-brimmed hat, the Старуха, who holds a long blue cane. After the Гвардейцы salute, the Старуха gestures with her cane, then warmly welcomes the Девочка, asking in an aged voice, "Ах ты бедная крошечка. Здравствуйте! Как ты попала на эту большую и быструю?" The Девочка reaches for the Старуха's hand, and the Старуха leads her through the gate into the estate. Inside, the Старуха greets the Девочка, who asks, “Я ищу моего названного братца Кая,” and the Старуха, in a kind voice, invites her in, saying, “Пойдём, пойдём. Ты голодна и устала.” Admiring the vibrant flowers in the lush garden, the Девочка asks, “Можно, я спрошу у них, где Кай?” The Старуха leads her to a stone bench under a rose trellis, gently places her down, and reveals a kind expression, telling her, “Ты сама как цветок. И мне давно, давно хотелось иметь такую миленькую, маленькую девочку.” Though the Девочка initially resists rest, saying, “Нет, нет! Я должна искать Кая!”, the Старуха urges her to sleep, “Ложись и отдохни. Спи, спи. Забудь обо всём,” as the serene atmosphere transitions to a melancholic orchestral tone.

Девочка в красном платье и коричневом ка.description: Girl with long blonde hair, wearing a red skirt, white sleeves, and a dark blue vest, who arrives at the gate with a small white bag, asking in a young, determined voice, “Я ищу моего названного братца Кая” (I'm looking for my adopted brother Kai). As she enters the garden, she exclaims, “Ах, какие красивые цветы!” (Oh, what beautiful flowers!) and then asks, “Можно, я спрошу у них, где Кай?” (Can I ask them where Kai is?). She is then led to a stone bench where she lies down, appearing tired, initially resisting rest by saying, “Нет, нет! Я должна искать Кая!” (No, no! I must look for Kai!) before succumbing to sleep.

Гвардейцы в белых мундирах.description: Two uniformed guards standing at attention by the gate, wearing white trousers, black boots, tall black hats with gold trim, and holding brass instruments; they salute as the girl arrives and remain motionless throughout.

Старуха в чёрном пальто и шляпе.description: Tall, elderly woman in a black coat with a wide-brimmed hat, holding a long blue cane, who greets the girl warmly at the gate, saying in a kind, gentle voice, “Пойдём, пойдём. Ты голодна и устала” (Let's go, let's go. You are hungry and tired). She guides her to a stone bench in the lush garden, gently placing her down and removing her hat. With a soothing tone, she tells the girl, “Ты сама как цветок. И мне давно, давно хотелось иметь такую миленькую, маленькую девочку” (You yourself are like a flower. And I have long, long wanted to have such a sweet, little girl). Later, she encourages the girl to rest, saying “Ложись и отдохни. Спи, спи. Забудь обо всём” (Lie down and rest. Sleep, sleep. Forget everything).

A girl with long blonde hair, in a red skirt, white sleeves, and a dark blue vest, emerges from behind the foliage and approaches the boat with wonder. She places a red shoe inside, unties the rope, and gently rows the boat into the river, passing under the willow’s branches as birds fly overhead. The setting transitions to a sunlit riverside estate with a white stone wall, a wooden gate adorned with green ivy and white flowers, and two uniformed guards standing at attention, holding brass instruments. As the girl rows toward the shore, she exclaims "Солдатики!" (Soldiers!) and then "Замолчите!" (Be quiet!) in a high-pitched voice, seemingly reacting to the guards' brass music, which continues with a whimsical, almost toy-like quality. A tall, imposing woman in a black coat with a wide-brimmed hat, holding a long blue cane, waits. The guards salute as the girl disembarks. The woman, identified as the Старуха, gestures with her cane, then bends down to greet the girl warmly, placing a hand on her shoulder. In a gentle, slightly aged voice, the Старуха asks, "Ах ты бедная крошечка. Здравствуйте! Как ты попала на эту большую и быструю?" (Oh, you poor little crumb. Hello! How did you get on this big and fast [river/boat implied]?). The girl reaches out to touch the woman’s hand, sharing a moment of connection before the woman leads her through the gate into the estate, while the guards, detailed with white trousers, black boots, and tall hats with gold trim, remain motionless, and the orchestral music transitions to a more dramatic, melancholic tone.

As they walk through the gate into a lush garden filled with vibrant flowers and a trellis covered in roses, the girl exclaims, “Ах, какие красивые цветы!” (Oh, what beautiful flowers!) and then asks, “Можно, я спрошу у них, где Кай?” (Can I ask them where Kai is?). The Старуха leads her to a stone bench beneath the trellis, where she gently places the girl down and removes her hat, revealing a kind expression. With a soothing tone, the Старуха tells her, “Ты сама как цветок. И мне давно, давно хотелось иметь такую миленькую, маленькую девочку” (You yourself are like a flower. And I have long, long wanted to have such a sweet, little girl). The girl lies down on the bench, appearing tired or perhaps in need of rest, initially resisting by saying, “Нет, нет! Forget everything), as the serene atmosphere, enhanced by soft lighting, rich floral details, and bird chirping, suggests a safe haven and a transition from journey to rest.

event_blocks.summary: In a lush garden with a lattice backdrop of blooming flowers, accompanied by a gentle, melancholic orchestral melody, the Девочка в красном платье и коричневом капюшоне lies asleep on a stone bench. The Старуха в чёрном пальто и шляпе, holding a long blue cane, gently places her hand on the girl’s shoulder, waking her. The girl sits up, confused and distressed, asking, "Зачем я здесь? Куда шла? Зачем? Ничего не помню." The old woman helps her to her feet, and the girl walks through the garden, her expression shifting from drowsiness to sorrow, lamenting, "Почему мне так тяжело? У меня какое-то горе." She stops before a bush with a red and a white rose, gently touching the white rose, which appears wilting. A gasp escapes her as she says, "Розы... Розы... белые... алые..." Her face contorts in grief as she clutches her chest, and with a sudden realization, she exclaims, "Вспомнила!" accompanied by a dramatic musical swell and a deep chime. She then turns away, her eyes filled with sadness, and walks toward a distant, illuminated house, her steps heavy with emotion, as the dark, shadowy environment with soft moonlight continues to emphasize a mood of melancholy and loss, underscored by the ongoing dramatic music.

raw_segments: The scene opens in a lush garden with a lattice backdrop of blooming pink and orange flowers, accompanied by a gentle, melancholic orchestral melody. Gerda, a young girl with long blonde hair, wearing a red skirt, white sleeves, and a dark blue vest, lies peacefully asleep on a stone bench, her head resting on a white pillow. Beside her stands a tall, elderly woman, identified by a male narrator as a sorceress, in a black coat and wide-brimmed hat, holding a long blue cane, gently placing her hand on Gerda’s shoulder in a protective or comforting gesture. The narrator explains that this old woman, though not evil, is now casting spells to keep Gerda with her at all costs, intending for Gerda to forget everything, especially Kai. The music becomes more dramatic and slightly ominous as the scene transitions to a dimly lit, warm-toned interior. Here, a small gnome-like character with white hair, a red hat, and a red coat sits atop a large dark vase with a feathered adornment. He initially appears distressed, wiping his eyes with a handkerchief, then becomes animated, gesturing emphatically as if delivering a passionate speech or song, his expressions shifting from sorrow to determination as he raises his hand in a commanding gesture. The final shot reveals a magical, glowing garden of flowers with ethereal light emanating from their centers, suggesting a transition to a fantastical or enchanted realm, as the music continues with a determined yet slightly melancholic orchestral theme.

The scene opens in a dark, moonlit garden, an ethereal atmosphere created by a white lattice gazebo and glowing flowers, all set to a melancholic, almost eerie orchestral score. A young girl with long blonde hair, wearing a red skirt, white sleeves, and a dark blue vest, lies asleep on a stone bench with a white pillow. An elderly woman, the 'Старуха в чёрном пальто и шляпе', gently places her hand on the girl’s shoulder, waking her. The girl sits up, looking confused and distressed, her voice filled with confusion as she asks, "Зачем я здесь? Куда шла? Зачем? Ничего не помню." The old woman helps her to her feet. The girl then walks through the garden, her expression shifting from drowsiness to sorrow, her voice now tinged with deep sadness, "Почему мне так тяжело? У меня какое-то горе." She stops before a bush with a red and a white rose, gently touching the white rose, which appears wilting or damaged. A gasp escapes her as she says, "Розы... Розы... белые... алые..." Her face contorts in grief as she clutches her chest, and with a sudden, sharp realization, she exclaims, "Вспомнила!" accompanied by a dramatic musical swell and a deep chime. She then turns away, her eyes filled with sadness, and walks toward a distant, illuminated house, her steps heavy with emotion, as the dark, shadowy environment with soft moonlight continues to emphasize a mood of melancholy and loss, underscored by the ongoing dramatic music.

event_blocks.summary: In a dimly lit cavern, Гвардейцы в белых мундирах salute as ethereal music begins, and Девочка в красном платье и коричневом капюшоне, identified as Gerda, appears beside him. Gerda plays a Золотой рог, pleading, "Не надо... Не шумить... Не трубите... Пожалейте маленькую Герду." The scene transitions to a shadowy garden where Gerda approaches a Каменная дверь с аркой, asking, "Калитка... Милая калитка... Мне надо искать Кая. Выпусти меня, пожалуйста." She opens the door with a creak, steps through into a Магическая цветочная поляна with a distant Дом в саду, and a triumphant fanfare sounds as she calls out "Кай!" and "Помоги! Кай!". The scene shifts to a desolate, stormy coast where Gerda, distressed, mutters, "О, не плачь, Кая." A чёрно-белая птица approaches, and a male voice greets her, "Здравствуйте." The girl, following the bird, admits, "Мне очень страшно, но я ищу Кая." Later, the чёрно-белая птица stands on the shore as a male voice calls "Кай!" twice. Gerda, barefoot, describes someone as "хороший, добрый, смелый," and the male voice confirms Kai's appearance and his popularity with "нашей принцессе." The scene moves to a barren forest where the male voice states Kai and the princess are inseparable. Gerda asks, "Господин Карабс, скажите, как мне его найти?" and is told, "Нет ничего проще. Я отведу вас во дворец." The male voice describes Kai's "русые кудри" and "голубые глаза," leading Gerda to excitedly exclaim "Кай!" and "Конечно, Кай! Скорее!" as she walks with the bird.

Девочка в красном платье и коричневом ка.description: Girl with long blonde hair, wearing a blue vest over a white blouse and a red skirt; she walks barefoot on a desolate shore and later through a barren forest, her expression shifting from distress to cautious hope as she interacts with the bird. She is referred to as 'нашей принцессе' (our princess) and speaks with a gentle, hopeful, pleading, and excited voice, actively seeking 'Kai'.

Дом в саду.description: Fairytale-style house with a pointed roof and white walls, visible in the distance beyond the garden, surrounded by trees and flowers; it appears as a destination or sanctuary, glowing softly in the dim light.

Каменная дверь с аркой.description: A large, arched stone door, initially closed, creaks open with a heavy sound as Gerda pushes it, revealing a lush garden beyond.

Птица чёрно-белая.description: Black-and-white bird resembling a magpie or crow, with a white patch on its chest and sharp, expressive eyes; it walks alongside the girl, appearing curious and attentive, and is strongly implied to be 'Kai' or his inseparable companion, as described in the dialogue.

raw_segments: The sequence begins with a soldier in a red coat, white cross-belts, and a tall black hat, standing in a dimly lit, rocky cavern, saluting as ethereal, slightly melancholic music starts. A girl, identified by her soft, pleading Russian voice as Gerda, with long blonde hair, wearing a red skirt, white sleeves, and a dark blue vest, appears beside him. She plays a golden horn with a focused expression, while her voice is heard saying, "Не надо... Не шумить... Не трубите... Пожалейте маленькую Герду." The background shifts to a floral, shadowy garden as the soldier remains silently behind her. Gerda approaches a large, arched stone door, continuing to speak, "Калитка... Милая калитка... Мне надо искать Кая. Выпусти меня, пожалуйста." She knocks and pushes the door open with a determined gesture, accompanied by the distinct sound of a large, heavy door creaking, and then says, "Спасибо." As she steps through, revealing a lush, flower-filled garden with a distant, fairytale-style house, a powerful, triumphant horn fanfare sounds, and the music swells. Gerda turns back briefly, then walks gracefully and purposefully into the garden, her voice becoming increasingly distressed and desperate as she repeatedly calls out "Кай!" and "Помоги! Кай!" The scene abruptly cuts to a dark, desolate landscape under a stormy sky with footprints, then to a dramatic seascape at dusk with waves crashing against jagged rocks and wind sounds, as the music becomes chaotic and then fades, evoking a sense of isolation and foreboding.

The scene opens with a desolate, stormy coastal landscape under a heavy, dark sky, with turbulent waves crashing against jagged rocks, accompanied by dramatic, ominous orchestral music. A flock of white birds flies erratically across the frame. The camera then focuses on a young girl with long blonde hair, wearing a blue vest over a white blouse and a red skirt, sitting pensively on a rock by the shore. She appears distressed, clutching her hands together, and softly mutters, "О, не плачь, Кая." A black-and-white bird, resembling a magpie or crow, approaches her from the right, landing near her feet and looking up with an inquisitive gaze. As the music shifts to a more whimsical, almost circus-like tune, a deep, theatrical male voice greets her with "Здравствуйте." The girl stands up, her expression shifting to cautious curiosity, and she replies, "Здравствуйте." The male voice introduces himself, "Меня зовут Каракс," to which the girl responds, "Очень приятно." Karaks then asks, "Почему вы гуляете так поздно и совсем одна? Неужели вам, [bird sound], не страшно?" The girl, now following the bird as it turns and walks away, her bare feet touching the dark, wet sand, admits, "Мне очень страшно, но я ищу Кая." She then addresses him directly, "Постойте, Каракс. Может быть, вы знаете, где..." The atmosphere remains somber and foreboding, with the dark clouds and churning sea emphasizing a sense of isolation and impending danger, as the girl follows the bird, seeking help in her quest.

Under a stormy, dark sky, a black-and-white bird, resembling a magpie or crow, stands inquisitively on a desolate, rocky shore. An orchestral score begins to swell as a male voice calls out "Кай!" twice, then "Привет, мой мальчик!" The scene cuts to a distressed girl, barefoot in a red skirt and blue vest, on the same bleak shore. A gentle female voice, likely hers, describes someone as "хороший, добрый, смелый" (good, kind, brave), echoed by the male voice. As the girl hesitantly walks, the bird follows closely. The male voice narrates, "Недавно у нас появился один такой" (Recently, one like that appeared to us), prompting the girl's hopeful query, "Может быть, это Кай?" (Maybe it's Kai?). The male voice confirms his appearance and states, "И очень понравился нашей принцессе" (And our princess liked him very much), to which the girl's voice responds, "Кай не может не нравиться" (Kai cannot but be liked). The background shifts to a barren forest as the male voice continues, "И теперь она его от себя никуда не отпускает. Они стали неразлучными" (And now she doesn't let him go anywhere from her. They became inseparable). A stylized "Харрр! Харрр!" sound is heard, followed by the male voice declaring "Товарищи!" (Comrades!). The girl gestures as if pleading, asking a male voice, "Господин Карабс, скажите, как мне его найти?" (Mr. Karabs, tell me, how can I find him?). The male voice reassures her, "Нет ничего проще. Я отведу вас во дворец" (There's nothing simpler. I will lead you to the palace). The orchestral music swells dramatically as the male voice describes "Кай" as having "русые кудри" (light brown curls) and "голубые глаза" (blue eyes). The girl, her expression shifting from sorrow to hope, excitedly exclaims "Кай!" and then "Конечно, Кай! Скорее!" (Of course, Kai! Quickly!), as she continues walking beside the attentive bird, suggesting a shared purpose and a developing bond.

event_blocks.summary: The Девочка в красном платье и коричневом капюшоне, barefoot and accompanied by the Птица чёрно-белая, walks along a muddy path in a desolate forest at dusk, hearing distant shouts of "Скорей, бежим!" and "Не кричи!" before an orchestral score begins. Approaching a grand iron gate, a deep male voice states, "Ну вот. Пришли." The girl, now in a blue vest over a white blouse and red skirt, touches the gate, exclaiming, "Как здесь красиво!" The gate opens, revealing a dimly lit courtyard with glowing windows and silhouetted figures. The black-and-white bird caws "Карр! Карр!" as the male voice introduces, "Это моя невеста," followed by a "Здравствуйте" from another female voice, and then, "Она служит во дворце. А это сестра нашего принца," met with a "Здравствуйте" from a regal female voice. The male voice announces, "Вы очень удачно попали к нам. Сегодня во дворце бал," eliciting a gasp from the girl, but then mockingly adds, "Но ах... Вас не пустят во дворец." When the girl asks, "Почему?", he explains, "Но вы же босая..." leading to her disappointed sigh, "Ох, босая..." as she steps through the gate into the unknown, the bird beside her. Later, two black-and-white birds caw "Карр, карр!" as the male voice instructs the girl, "Подойди," "Не бойся," and "Жди." He then says, "А с ней я проведу вас с чёрного хода," and the girl excitedly exclaims, "Спасибо!" A creaking sound accompanies the gate's opening, revealing a dimly lit courtyard with glowing windows and dancing silhouettes, accompanied by a grand, magical orchestral score. The girl gasps and exclaims, "Ой, как хорошо!" as the camera pans to show the estate's grandeur, including fireworks. Another "Карр!" and a gasp are heard as the music becomes more dramatic, concluding with the girl standing inside the gate, filled with awe and anticipation.

Two black-and-white birds, resembling magpies, observe her from either side, their caws ("Карр, карр!") punctuating the air. A deep, gravelly male voice, seemingly addressing the birds, instructs the girl, "Подойди" (Come closer), then reassures her, "Не бойся" (Don't be afraid), and finally, "Жди" (Wait). The girl looks down, then turns to face the gate, reaching out to touch it with a hopeful expression. The male voice continues, "А с ней я проведу вас с чёрного хода" (And with her, I will lead you through the back entrance), implying a secret passage. The girl, her voice high-pitched with excitement, exclaims, "Спасибо!" (Thank you!). A heavy creaking sound accompanies the gate, set between twisted stone pillars, as it slowly opens. event_blocks.summary: The Девочка в красном платье и коричневом капюшоне, her expression shifting from hopeful curiosity to apprehension, asks "Все уже спят?" and then with determination, "Идём. Беги!" before proceeding through an ornate iron gate that opens with a creaking and grinding sound, revealing a dimly lit courtyard. Two black crows with white chests flank her as she passes a stone archway where a Гвардейцы в белых мундирах, holding a spear and a lantern, stands watch. The guard gruffly instructs, "Возьмите. Пригодится," and the girl politely accepts the lantern with a "Спасибо." He steps aside, allowing her passage into the shadowy interior of the Замок с подземельями, the crows remaining by her side. As she whispers, "Там кто-то стоит," the camera focuses on a large, dark, hanging figure, possibly a Статуя мужчины, illuminated by faint blue light with glowing white lines. The guard's sarcastic voice returns, "Какая наивность! Это только доспехи. А внутри, слышите?" followed by the sound of heavy thumping and his question, "Что там?" The girl, still accompanied by the crows, cautiously approaches. Later, in a dimly lit corridor, she whispers, "Кто там?" and asks, "Ну скажи, скоро ли я увижу Кая?" The camera reveals a vast hall with stone pillars and shadowy, glowing Статуя мужчины figures. A male voice ominously counts, "Раз, два. Раз, два. Раз, два. Три, четыре," followed by the warning, "Погубите всех нас. Сойдут." The girl hides behind a pillar, clutching her lantern, while the Птица чёрно-белая remain vigilant amidst the tense atmosphere, illuminated only by her lantern and faint glimmers from the figures, as heavy, rhythmic mechanical thudding sounds resonate through the castle.

Что вы делаете?" as the figure begins, "Это настоящий..." and then states, "Ну вот, вы и пришли." The girl anticipates, "Сейчас я его увижу." raw_segments: The scene opens in a dimly lit, stone-walled corridor, accompanied by eerie, whimsical string music. A barefoot girl with long blonde hair, wearing a blue vest, white blouse, and red skirt, cautiously walks forward, holding a glowing lantern. She expresses her fear, whispering, "Как бьётся сердце?" (How my heart beats?). Two black-and-white birds, resembling magpies, follow her closely, one on each side, observing her with alert curiosity and occasionally emitting distinct squawks. As she moves, the camera reveals a large, dark column and a framed portrait, adding to the foreboding atmosphere. Her expression shifts to fear as she encounters a towering, cloaked shadowy figure with glowing red eyes and a long staff, who looms over her. The figure, speaking in a deep male voice, remarks, "А несносная болтливость." (And unbearable talkativeness.) and then commands, "Идёмте." (Let's go.). The girl instinctively raises her fist in defiance before bowing her head in submission, while the bird on the left flaps its wings and scurries away. The girl then approaches a heavy, ornate door, pushing it open with effort. She exclaims, "Ещё один!" (Another one!) and then, "Красота! Что вы делаете?" (Beauty! What are you doing?), as the shadowy figure continues, "Это настоящий..." (This is a real...). The figure then states, "Ну вот, вы и пришли." (Well, here you are.), as the girl anticipates, "Сейчас я его увижу." (Now I will see him/it.). Inside, she finds a vast, cavernous hall with stone pillars, a central throne-like structure draped in dark curtains, and a large, glowing spiral column. The hall is dimly lit by flickering torches, with scattered debris suggesting abandonment, and the suspenseful, orchestral music swells, building to a grander tone as the girl stands at the threshold, lantern in hand, entering what feels like a forbidden realm.

event_blocks.summary: In a dimly lit, opulent corridor, eerie orchestral music sets a mysterious tone as a barefoot girl in a blue vest, white blouse, and red skirt cautiously walks forward holding a glowing lantern. She enters a dark, shadowy bedroom where a boy in a golden crown lies asleep in an ornate golden bed covered with a blue quilt. As the girl whispers, "Хай, милый гай. Проснись." and shines the lantern on his face, the boy awakens with a startled gasp, sitting up and sleepily responding, "Нашла." The girl, surprised, remarks, "Ой, милый он," but then yelps "Ай!" as she recoils and drops the lantern. Simultaneously, two black-and-white birds burst through the door with loud screeches and frantic flapping, the music swelling to an intense, chaotic climax. One bird lunges at the boy, who flinches with an "Ой!", while the other flies toward the girl, causing her to step back. The birds then turn to the fallen lantern, and one pecks at it, producing a spark. The scene shifts as the girl, now holding the lantern, approaches the boy, who is sitting up, and softly says, "Не бойся." She then lights candles on a large candelabra, illuminating the room as the music becomes more whimsical. The boy, fully awake, stands beside the bed, and the girl places a hand on his shoulder, asking, "Бедная девочка, скажи, что с тобой?" and "Простите меня и моих друзей." The girl exclaims, "Так интересно!" The boy lifts a white, patterned blanket from the bed's edge, revealing a hidden object. The girl watches with concern and curiosity, stating, "Я думала, что вы мой названный братец Кай. Я ищу его по всему свету," adding, "Ах, как романтично!" and finally, "Вы что-то скрываете?" The boy stands alone by the bed, holding the object, while the girl steps back, thoughtful, in the richly decorated room with ornate furniture, a table with cherub statues, and a twisted rope-like structure.

Девочка в красном платье и коричневом ка.description: Girl with long blonde hair, wearing a blue vest over a white blouse and a red skirt, barefoot, holding a glowing lantern; her expression shifts from cautious curiosity to shock as she encounters the awakened boy and the aggressive birds, then to concern and thoughtfulness as she interacts with him, speaking with a clear, inquisitive, and somewhat dramatic voice, asking the boy 'Не бойся.' (Don't be afraid.), 'Бедная девочка, скажи, что с тобой?' (Poor girl, tell me, what's wrong with you?), 'Простите меня и моих друзей.' (Forgive me and my friends.), exclaiming 'Так интересно!' (So interesting!) and 'Ах, как романтично!' (Oh, how romantic!), and revealing her quest by stating, 'Я думала, что вы мой названный братец Кай. Я ищу его по всему свету.' (I thought you were my foster brother Kai. I'm looking for him all over the world.), finally asking, 'Вы что-то скрываете?' (Are you hiding something?).

Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапк.description: Boy with light brown hair, wearing a blue quilted blanket and a small golden crown, initially asleep in an ornate golden bed; he suddenly awakens with a startled expression, sits up, flinches at the birds’ sudden appearance, and later stands by the bed holding a hidden object, though he does not speak in this segment, he is directly addressed by the girl.

Птица чёрно-белая.description: Black-and-white birds resembling magpies or crows, with white chest patches and sharp, expressive eyes; they burst through the door, flapping wildly, screeching with high-pitched, frantic, almost musical sounds, and attacking the boy and the lantern, one pecking at the fallen lantern and causing a spark.

Комната с мебелью.description: Dimly lit room with warm, reddish-brown tones, featuring an ornate golden bed with a patterned blanket, a large candelabra, a table with cherub statues, and a twisted rope-like structure in the center, serving as the setting for the chaotic intrusion and the boy’s awakening, accompanied by dramatic orchestral music that transitions to a more whimsical, magical tone.

She enters a dark, shadowy bedroom, the music growing more suspenseful, where a young boy lies peacefully asleep in an ornate golden bed, covered with a blue quilt and wearing a small golden crown. As the girl approaches, she softly whispers, "Хай, милый гай. Проснись." (Hi, dear guy. Wake up.), then leans closer, shining the lantern’s light on his face. The boy suddenly awakens with a startled gasp, sitting up with wide eyes, and sleepily responds, "Нашла." (Found you.). The girl, surprised, softly remarks, "Ой, милый он." (Oh, he's cute.), but then yelps "Ай!" in shock as she recoils and drops the lantern. At that moment, two black-and-white birds resembling magpies or crows, with sharp eyes and white chest patches, burst through the door with loud screeches and frantic flapping, the orchestral music swelling to an intense, chaotic climax with percussion and brass. One of the birds lunges at the boy, who flinches back with an "Ой!", while the other bird flies toward the girl, causing her to step back in fear. The birds then turn their attention to the lantern, which has fallen to the floor, and one of them pecks at it, causing a distinct spark. The scene is tense and mysterious, with dark, swirling patterns on the walls and low, dramatic lighting emphasizing the contrast between the warm glow of the lantern and the deep shadows of the room.

The scene opens with a chaotic intrusion as a group of black-and-white birds, resembling magpies or crows, burst through a door with high-pitched, frantic screeches, flapping wildly and attacking a boy in a blue quilted blanket and small golden crown who is asleep in an ornate golden bed. The birds screech and peck at a lantern, causing sparks to fly, all set to dramatic orchestral music. The boy awakens with a startled expression, flinching as the birds swarm around him. A girl with long blonde hair, wearing a blue vest over a white blouse and a red skirt, barefoot and holding a glowing lantern, enters the dimly lit room. Her expression shifts from cautious curiosity to shock as she witnesses the commotion. She approaches the boy, who is now sitting up, and they exchange a moment of silent communication before she softly says, "Не бойся." (Don't be afraid.) The girl then turns to a large, ornate candelabra, lighting the candles with her lantern, illuminating the room as the music shifts to a more whimsical, magical tone. The boy, now fully awake, stands beside the bed, looking around nervously. The girl gently places a hand on his shoulder, asking, "Бедная девочка, скажи, что с тобой?" (Poor girl, tell me, what's wrong with you?) and then, "Простите меня и моих друзей." (Forgive me and my friends.) They share a moment of connection, and the girl exclaims, "Так интересно!" (So interesting!) The boy then turns to the bed, where a white, patterned blanket is draped over the bed’s edge, and he carefully lifts it, revealing a hidden object beneath. The girl watches him with a mix of concern and curiosity, stating, "Я думала, что вы мой названный братец Кай. Я ищу его по всему свету." (I thought you were my foster brother Kai. I'm looking for him all over the world.) She then adds, "Ах, как романтично!" (Oh, how romantic!) and finally, "Вы что-то скрываете?" (Are you hiding something?) as the scene ends with the boy standing alone by the bed, holding the object, while the girl steps back, her expression thoughtful. The richly decorated room features ornate furniture, including a table with cherub statues and a large, twisted rope-like structure in the center, suggesting a luxurious, yet mysterious, setting.

event_blocks.summary: In a dimly lit, ornate room, guards in black armor with red trim and white collars, wielding spears, burst through a door with a loud exclamation of "дураки!" and sharp commands, accompanied by screeching, black-and-white birds that attack a lantern, causing sparks. The guards and birds converge on a boy in a blue quilted blanket and small golden crown, who awakens startled in an ornate golden bed, sits up, flinches as the birds swarm him, and pleads "Отпустите всех!". The guards retreat, leaving the boy and two distressed girls near the bed. The scene shifts to a dark, starry balcony where the boy and girls stand together, looking down at a mysterious dark substance spreading on the floor; the boy holds a hidden object, and the girls react with concern. A small, animated gnome-character with white hair, a red hat, red coat, and green tunic, perched atop a large dark vase, initially cries with a handkerchief, then becomes joyful and expressive, gesturing passionately while holding a feather, asking "О чём ты плачешь, бедная девочка?" and "Как, как кровь сильно?", before reflecting "Да, это был не Кай. Какая горькая обида," and questioning "Ну, в самом деле, где Кай? Осмотрим." He leaps from the vase, lands on a large globe, and then jumps onto a bookshelf. The scene transitions to a surreal, animated miniature town with snow-covered rooftops and cobblestone streets, where a man in a black coat and top hat walks briskly, holding a closed umbrella, while a plump woman in a blue dress and red apron stumbles backward in surprise. Children in colorful winter clothing play in the snow, sledding and laughing. A towering, crystalline ice castle with jagged spires, glowing embers, and falling snow emerges from darkness as a vortex dissipates, serving as the Snow Queen’s icy domain, underscored by a dynamic orchestral score. The Гном-персонаж carefully drops a sharp, icy shard into a swirling vortex below, uttering "Ой!" and "Ш-ш-ш!", then asking "Что? Что она?" before declaring, "Ледяная вершина земли." The vortex transforms into a jagged, crystalline landscape, accompanied by whimsical, slightly eerie, high-pitched string music that transitions into a grander, more ominous orchestral score. The camera descends through this icy terrain into a vast, cavernous hall of towering ice spires, part of the Ледяной замок. At its center, the Снежная Королева sits on her dark, imposing Трон Снежной Королевы. Kai, a boy in a brown coat and pants, kneels amidst shattered ice fragments, picks up a small, glowing blue crystal, and exclaims, "Они интереснее живых!" The Снежная Королева rises from her throne and addresses him with a clear, cold voice, stating, "Ты прав, Кай." In a vast, dark, and reflective crystalline chamber, Kai kneels amidst shattered ice fragments, holding a glowing blue crystal. The Snow Queen, on her dark, imposing throne, remarks on the crystal's "precision" and Kai's intelligence, "Ты стал очень умным, Кай." Kai responds "Да," then observes, "Но они совсем не пахнут." The Queen rises and lectures Kai, "Кай, я много раз говорила тебе: аромат цветов, красота и радость, стихи поэтов и любовь... Их не существует." She forcefully instructs him, "Ты должен забыть все это, Кай. Забыть!" Kai softly responds "Да," then repeats, "Забыть." The Queen asks, "Ты знаешь, что такое радость, Кай?" Kai replies, "Нет." She presses, "А красота?" to which he responds, "Нет, не знаю."

She then speaks of Герда, prophesying Kai's heart will soon turn to ice, accompanied by chilling music. The scene transitions to a sunlit courtyard where a golden Карета с лошадьми arrives, announced by a theatrical male voice, as a Женщина в синем платье и красном фартуке waves from a balcony. A whimsical tune plays as a Гном-персонаж runs past the carriage, followed by Gerda, who is wished luck by a stern woman in a feathered headdress. Two black Птица чёрно-белая take flight, cawing. Gerda is then inside the carriage, expressing gratitude and farewells as it departs, accompanied by the sounds of horse hooves and carriage wheels. A deep male voice wishes Gerda a safe journey. Gerda reflects on the kindness of people and animals. The music shifts to a dramatic orchestral piece as the carriage gallops through a dark forest, silhouetted against the moon, suggesting a perilous journey.

The stark contrast between the cold, magical realm and the lively domestic scene, underscored by the celebratory music, suggests a narrative shift or flashback. event_blocks.summary: In a dimly lit, cavernous forest with gnarled, icy trees, two bandits in black hats and red-trimmed clothing loot a large pile of gold coins spilled from an overturned carriage, the coins clinking softly. The shorter, stockier bandit frantically counts and grabs coins, muttering, "Олопал, Миха," while the taller, slimmer bandit watches smugly. A small girl in a red hooded cloak appears, standing calmly amidst the chaos. The second bandit exclaims, "Девчонка!" and laughs maniacally, commenting on her appearance and suggesting tasting her. The first bandit, startled, drops his coins, gestures wildly, and attempts to hide his loot. The girl remains composed. As the first bandit tries to intimidate her with a knife, she calmly steps forward. The second bandit intervenes, grabbing her arm, but the girl resists with high-pitched squeals, pulls free, and confronts him with a determined look, holding a small knife. The first bandit growls, "Ты что, кусаться? Ах ты дрянь!" The girl commands, "Прочь! Это моя игрушка!" The second bandit remarks, "Ух, какая муфточка!" The first bandit demands, "Дай сюда!", while the second taunts, "На маму!" The girl asserts, "Отойдите вы все! Ну, ну, ну!", with a small "Ой!" before the first bandit ironically tells her, "Не бойся." The scene is tense, with the bandits’ greed and aggression contrasting with the girl’s quiet resolve, set against the cold, shadowy environment where the gold coins gleam faintly, accompanied by eerie, whimsical background music.

I am walking across the wide world, looking for my foster brother Kai.” The Старушка calls this “Stupid,” asks where he is, and upon Gerda's “I don't know,” exclaims “Terrible!” The claustrophobic and tense mood of the chamber is palpable throughout their interaction.

The camera then shifts to two women seated on rocks: a girl with dark hair in a red dress with black suspenders, and an elderly woman with long white hair in a red coat with white fur trim. They appear concerned, gasping in alarm as a large black-and-white deer with a white blaze on its face is suddenly lowered into the cavern by a rope, accompanied by a distinct thud. The deer rears up, thrashing its head, snorting and whinnying, further startling the women. The dark-haired girl points at the deer, while the white-haired woman raises her hands in fear. The deer then moves toward a wooden beam where three pigeons—two white and one pink—are perched, which are startled and flap their wings briefly before settling again, accompanied by brief bird sounds. The women continue to exchange anxious glances, their expressions tense in the shadowy, stone-walled environment. Amidst the commotion, a bandit's voice cuts through, declaring in Russian, "Listen, I will set you free, but for that, you will take the girl to that very Snow Queen." The girl, surprisingly, exclaims in Russian, "Oh, how good!", followed by the deer's deep voice responding in Russian, "Thank you." Laughter and commotion resume, punctuated by the girl's squeals and giggles, until the bandit shouts in Russian, "Now, you quiet down! Or I'll change my mind!" The girl urgently whispers in Russian, "Quiet, or he'll change his mind!" and then adds, "Wait!"

event_blocks.summary: In a dimly lit, cavernous stone setting, an elderly woman in a red coat with white fur trim instructs a barefoot girl in a red dress over an orange shirt to "take the hat" and "hurry!", while also telling her to "Be quiet and don't cry!" and playfully asking if she can "split in two." The girl, initially distressed and making soft sounds, thanks the woman, saying "Thank you for everything!" A large black deer named Dina, initially calm, becomes agitated, rearing and thrashing its head with whip cracks and whinnies as the elderly woman tries to hold its reins. The woman urgently commands the deer, "Get out of here! Gallop like lightning!" and to "protect the girl!" before bidding it "Farewell!" The deer bolts away with distinct hoofbeats. The girl steps back in fear, then runs toward a barred stone gate where several frightened white rabbits are trapped, freeing them by pushing the gate aside. As the deer's galloping sounds fade, the girl stands alone, looking downcast, softly repeating "You are very gentle, Dina" and making mournful sounds, emotionally drained, while a fox and a small bird appear briefly in the background and dramatic music underscores the tense and foreboding atmosphere of the hidden underground space.

Amidst this maelstrom, a girl with long white hair, wearing a blue top and red skirt, tumbles dynamically through the air, her clothes flapping and hair flowing wildly. The camera follows her rapid descent as the music maintains its grandeur, until she lands heavily and lies motionless on a frozen, misty plain, appearing exhausted or unconscious. The environment shifts to a dark, icy expanse, accompanied by a more sustained and slightly eerie musical passage, as a towering, jagged ice castle emerges in the distance. Its crystalline spires glow faintly with an eerie blue light, its dark, reflective interior hinting at broken ice fragments. The girl remains prone on the ground, small and vulnerable against the vast, foreboding structure, suggesting she has been cast into the heart of the Snow Queen’s domain. The music softens, becoming more ethereal with high strings, emphasizing the cold, desolate atmosphere and heavy anticipation as the storm clears to reveal the next stage of her perilous journey.

event_blocks.summary: A girl in a red dress and brown hood, identified as Gerda, tumbles through a stormy sky before landing on an icy plain near a glowing ice castle. She calls out for Kai, stating she is coming to him. Meanwhile, a boy in a brown coat and white hooded cloak, Kai, climbs an ice formation using a blue crystal. Gerda, concerned, watches Kai ascend, and when he loses his footing, she rushes to catch him. Kai, distressed, clutches his chest and identifies the blue crystal as his shard. Gerda gestures toward the ice wall, and Kai, calling her Gerda, seems to understand. Gerda exclaims that someone knew, as they share a moment of connection, their reflections visible on the glossy ice floor within the cold, cavernous environment.

Ледяной замок.description: Towering, crystalline ice castle with jagged spires and glowing embers, visible in the background; the interior is dark and reflective, with broken ice fragments scattered across the floor, creating a cold, magical atmosphere; the structure looms over the characters, emphasizing the scale and danger of their environment.

Девочка в красном платье и коричневом ка.description: Girl with long white hair, wearing a blue top and red skirt, who identifies herself as Gerda and calls the boy Kai; she initially watches the boy climb with concern, rushes to catch him when he falls, pulls him to safety, comforts him by placing a hand on his shoulder, asking about his pain, and later gestures toward the ice wall, showing determination and care, and exclaiming 'He knew!'

Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапк.description: Boy with light brown hair, wearing a brown coat and white hooded cloak, identified as Kai by the girl; he is initially climbing a steep ice formation using a small blue crystal, which he calls 'my shard'; he struggles, loses footing, is rescued by the girl, and later appears distressed, clutching his chest and bending over in pain or exhaustion, also expressing concern about 'my figures' and calling the girl 'Dear Gerda'.

raw_segments: An ethereal, slightly melancholic string melody begins as a girl with long white hair, wearing a blue top and red skirt, tumbles through a dark, stormy sky before landing motionless on a frozen, icy plain. The camera then reveals the towering, jagged ice castle, glowing faintly with internal light against the ominous sky. The girl stirs, pushing herself up with effort, her expression one of exhaustion and fear. She whispers "Кай" (Kai), then states "Я иду к тебе" (I'm coming to you), and whispers "Кай" again, her voice soft and determined. The scene cuts to a boy with light brown hair, wearing a brown coat and white hooded cloak, who is seen climbing a steep ice formation, using a small blue crystal to aid his ascent. He reaches a ledge and looks down, where the girl stands below, surrounded by broken ice shards and towering ice pillars in the cold, cavernous environment, which features reflective surfaces and a misty, ethereal glow emanating from the background. The girl walks forward cautiously, her hands clasped, her face showing concern and determination, while the music builds with a sense of wonder and tension. The boy continues to climb, his movements deliberate, as the camera alternates between their perspectives, emphasizing their separation and the vast, icy expanse between them. The atmosphere is tense and magical, with the ice formations casting sharp shadows and the dim light creating a sense of isolation and danger. As the music swells, the girl calls out "Кай!" repeatedly, her voice growing more desperate and longing, echoing through the icy expanse.

In a cold, icy cavern illuminated by faint blue light, a melancholy, eerie orchestral score begins. The Девочка в красном платье и коричневом капюшоне, who identifies herself as Gerda, watches anxiously as the Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке, whom she calls Kai, struggles to ascend a steep, jagged ice formation using a small blue crystal for grip. Kai cautions Gerda to be careful, fearing she'll "knock over my figures." As Kai reaches the top and loses his footing, Gerda rushes forward to catch him, pulling him to safety. They stand together on the icy floor, both visibly shaken. Kai clutches his chest, appearing distressed, while Gerda gently places a hand on his shoulder, asking "How? Screaming? Painful? Right here?" He then bends over, seemingly in pain or exhaustion, before straightening up and questioning "From where?" He then identifies the blue crystal as "my shard," emphasizing its importance. The music shifts to a more dramatic, magical theme as Gerda gestures toward the ice wall, possibly indicating a path or warning of danger. Kai responds with a gesture of understanding, calling her "Gerda!" and then "Dear Gerda!" Gerda then exclaims, "He knew! He knew!" as they share a moment of connection, their reflections shimmering on the glossy ice floor. The environment remains stark and cold, with jagged ice formations and deep shadows emphasizing the perilous setting, dominated by the towering, crystalline Ледяной замок in the background.

event_blocks.summary: Within a vast, icy chamber, the Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке embraces the Девочка в красном платье и коричневом капюшоне, their reflections on the polished floor. Distant cries escalate into the boy's fearful shouts of "Kai! Kai!" as they walk towards the imposing Снежная Королева's Трон Снежной Королевы. A burst of magical energy erupts from the throne, showering the area with ice shards; the boy shields himself while the girl reacts with surprise. The throne then glows, accompanied by a swelling orchestral score and a magical hum, as the Снежная Королева rises, her regal form in white and beige robes, her headdress gleaming. The girl exclaims, "Снежная Королева!" and pleads, "Let's run from here! Let's run quickly!" The Queen, stern and commanding, stands motionless as the visibly shaken children face her. In a deep, chilling voice, the Снежная Королева states, "Too late." The Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке clutches his chest, while the Девочка в красном платье и коричневом капюшоне comforts him. The tense, cold atmosphere, underscored by an unsettling orchestral score, focuses on the Queen's authoritative face. The girl softly whispers, "Kai... I know... Kai is no longer yours."

The Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке and the Девочка в красном платье и коричневом капюшоне stood before her on a cracked, reflective floor littered with broken ice, the girl asking "Нет, да не будет ли?", the boy responding "Нет, да!", and the girl then asking "Что же ты молчишь?". The boy gestured anxiously while the girl placed a comforting hand on his shoulder. The Снежная Королева, speaking with a deeper, commanding voice, ordered "Уйди! Слышишь? Уйди!" as she rose from her throne, her form glowing faintly and magical energy whooshing as she ascended a short flight of steps, her hands resting on the armrests, while the music intensified dramatically. The scene transitioned to a vast, snowy landscape under a pale sky with soft clouds, accompanied by adventurous, whimsical music, where the children, now holding hands, walked across the snow, their small figures dwarfed by the environment, while the Снежная Королева, now towering and translucent, floated above them, ethereal and commanding. The children turned to each other, embracing emotionally, as a reindeer with large antlers appeared in the distance. The music became grand and orchestral as the scene shifted to a herd of reindeer atop a snow-covered cliff, then to a Мужчина в красном пальто на санях riding a sleigh pulled by two white horses across the snow, the music now lively and rhythmic. The Мужчина в красном пальто на санях shouted "Будьте счастливы!" as the children were shown riding on the sleigh, the boy holding the reins, galloping through the wintry expanse under a serene sky, while the children joyfully shouted "Прощай! Прощай! Прощай!" amidst triumphant, adventurous music.

event_blocks.summary: A man in a red coat rides a sleigh pulled by two white horses across a snowy mountain landscape, while an elderly woman in a red dress gestures anxiously from a rustic log cabin. A man in a brown vest and black hat rows a boy and girl across a calm river in a wooden boat, the boy shielding his eyes. In a forest, a man in a brown vest stands beside a wooden barrel as rabbits and a fox peek from behind rocks. A golden carriage pulled by a black horse with red plumes, driven by a man in a black coat and top hat, carries the boy and girl inside, with bandits joyfully riding on top, tossing bottles and dancing amidst laughter and shouts. A male voice exclaims, "Ой, счастливые дети!", followed by the girl's "Спасибо, спасибо!" and the boy's "Прощай!". More bandit shouts and laughter, including another male voice exclaiming, "Ой, счастливые!", before the boy's "Спасибо вам за всё!". The carriage speeds through a village with red-tiled roofs, passing a grand estate with a balcony where a woman in a blue dress and red apron and a man in a blue tunic gesture toward the boy. The carriage continues through the village, and the scene shifts to the boy and girl tending to plants in a sunlit garden. The atmosphere shifts to somber with a melancholic orchestral score as the girl kneels beside a broken white rose, showing grief, while the boy sits beside her, comforting her.

Next, a boy and girl are rowed by a man in a brown vest and black hat across a calm river in a wooden boat, the boy shielding his eyes as if spotting something in the distance, accompanied by the ongoing adventurous music. The setting changes to a forest where a man in a brown vest and fur-trimmed boots stands beside a wooden barrel, while a group of rabbits and a fox peek from behind rocks, suggesting a hidden or cautious presence, still with the adventurous music. The narrative then transitions to a golden carriage pulled by a black horse with red plumes, driven by a man in a black coat and top hat. More bandit shouts and laughter, including another male voice exclaiming, "Ой, счастливые!" (Oh, happy ones!), before the boy's voice adds, "Спасибо вам за всё!" (Thank you for everything!). The carriage speeds through a village with red-tiled roofs and narrow streets, passing a grand estate with a balcony where a woman in a blue dress and red apron and a man in a blue tunic gesture toward the boy, as the adventurous music and carriage sounds begin to fade. The atmosphere shifts dramatically from adventurous to somber, with a melancholic orchestral score replacing the previous upbeat music, as the girl kneels beside a broken white rose, showing grief, while the boy sits beside her, comforting her, emphasizing emotional connection and loss.

event_blocks.summary: Two children, a boy in a dark jacket and beige pants and a girl in a blue top and red skirt, sit calmly on a snowy balcony adorned with potted plants, accompanied by gentle, melancholic string music. The scene shifts to a white rose on a red-tiled roof, which opens to reveal a tiny gnome-like character with white hair, wearing a red coat, brown pants, and a red hat, holding a blue-handled sword. The gnome, appearing cheerful, gestures with open arms and speaks in Russian, reflecting, "Наши розы... Они снова расцвели." (Our roses... They bloomed again.) As the music becomes more whimsical and magical, the gnome continues, "Смею думать, что у них и у вас впереди ещё много чудесных сказок. А этой сад, понимаете..." (I dare to think that they and you still have many wonderful fairy tales ahead. And this garden, you understand...). The music swells orchestrally as the scene fades to a dark, cloudy sky with a city silhouette and the Cyrillic text 'КОНЕЦ СКАЗКИ' (End of the Tale). Production credits for 'Союзмультфильм' (1948), 'Новогодняя ночь', and the creative team appear on a dark, textured background framed by ornate, icy borders, displayed in stylized white Cyrillic text with a frosty, crystalline design, while the music transitions to a traditional, intricate melody with chimes and strings, slowly fading out.

event_blocks.summary: Inside a vast, crystalline ice cavern within the Ледяной замок, characterized by jagged blue ice formations and glowing star-shaped crystals, a Гном-персонаж in red robes and a white-haired figure wearing a red hat, accompanied by a white rabbit, struggles to pull a large, frost-covered Механический ящик across the icy terrain. Upon placing the box on a pedestal and connecting a microphone, the device emits distinct mechanical whirring, clanking, and ticking sounds. The gnome, Дедушка Мороз, speaks into the microphone with a deep male voice, initially stating "Yes, New Year!" and reassuringly telling someone, "Grandson, great! Don't worry, everything is ready." His tone then shifts to urgency and frustration as he exclaims, "What? Be quiet, you little ones! Are you joking or are you serious?" Simultaneously, a Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке pilots a red and black Ракета-транспорт through a starry night sky, gripping the steering wheel tightly. His expression transitions from focused to alarmed as red sparks fly past the cockpit, and he urgently demands in a high-pitched voice, "Let's find them! Grandfather Frost! There must always be golden cones! You old man, hurry up! So that the golden ones are definitely there! So that the little ones shine!"
