Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапк.description: A young boy, wearing a red and white winter outfit, black cap, and blue jacket, is seen piloting a red and black rocket-like vehicle through a starry night sky, his expression shifting from focused to alarmed as red sparks fly past the cockpit. He speaks with a high-pitched, urgent voice, addressing Дедушка Мороз as 'Grandfather Frost' and frantically demanding 'golden cones' to 'definitely be there' and 'shine.'

Гном-персонаж.description: Tiny gnome-like character with white hair, wearing a red coat, brown pants, and a red hat, seen struggling to pull a large, frost-covered mechanical box through an icy cavern. He is identified as Дедушка Мороз (Grandfather Frost) and speaks with a deep male voice, initially reassuring his 'grandson' that 'everything is ready,' but then expressing frustration and asking 'Are you joking or are you serious?'

Ракета-транспорт.description: Red and black rocket-like vehicle with a cockpit, piloted by the boy; it has a sleek, futuristic design with a curved front and a visible steering wheel, flying through a starry night sky, emitting sparks and showing signs of distress or damage.

Механический ящик.description: A large, ornate, frost-covered mechanical box with orange accents and a circular dial, which emits distinct mechanical whirring, clanking, and ticking sounds when operated. It serves as a communication device, with a microphone connected to it by the Гном-персонаж.

raw_segments: The scene opens inside a vast, crystalline ice cavern, part of the Ледяной замок, with jagged blue ice formations and glowing star-shaped crystals, all set to an upbeat, slightly frantic orchestral score. A small, red-robed Гном-персонаж, with white hair and a red hat, is seen struggling to pull a large, frost-covered Механический ящик through the icy terrain, accompanied by a small white rabbit. As he stops, places the box on a pedestal, and connects a microphone, distinct mechanical whirring, clanking, and ticking sounds emanate from the device. The gnome, identified as Дедушка Мороз, speaks into the microphone with a deep male voice, initially stating "Yes, New Year!" and reassuringly addressing someone as "Grandson, great! Don't worry, everything is ready." His tone quickly shifts to urgency and frustration, asking "What? Be quiet, you little ones! Are you joking or are you serious?" The camera then cuts to a close-up of a young boy, wearing a red and white winter outfit, black cap, and blue jacket, piloting a red and black Ракета-транспорт through a starry night sky. He grips the steering wheel tightly, his expression shifting from focused to alarmed as red sparks fly past the cockpit, and he responds with a high-pitched, urgent voice, frantically demanding, "Let's find them! Grandfather Frost! There must always be golden cones! You old man, hurry up! So that the golden ones are definitely there! So that the little ones shine!" The scene vividly contrasts the icy environment with the boy’s rocket, highlighting a frantic communication and escape attempt under pressure.

event_blocks.summary: A red and black Ракета-транспорт, emitting sparks and whirring sounds, hurtles through a starry sky, with the Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке inside gripping the steering wheel, alarmed by red sparks as a male voice laments the lack of 'golden cones' and dwindling time. The scene shifts to an icy cavern where a Санта-подобный персонаж, in a red robe, expresses concern about an 'old man' to a Белый кролик, who advises him to 'ask the moon' and let 'little things glow.' After thanking the rabbit and taking its paw, the elder picks up a large sack and passes the Изогнутые часы в ледяной стене, showing 10:10, its ticking underscoring urgency, before exiting into a snowy forest with the Белый кролик and a Серый кролик. The white rabbit holds a glowing object as the elder gestures and speaks to them. He then leaps onto a snowy ledge and, standing on a cliff under a crescent moon, asks it to 'show me the paths and roads.' Later, the Санта-подобный персонаж, on a cloud, asks the crescent moon about finding a 'forest miracle, a fir tree, golden cones,' and is directed to follow a bear's track. A rocket flies erratically, piloted by a Мужчина в чёрном пальто и цилиндре, who thanks the moon. The Санта-подобный персонаж warns of a 'forest spirit,' and a female voice from the rocket sings about a 'steel bird' needing to arrive by midnight. In a snowy forest, the Santa-like figure interacts with the rabbits, one holding a glowing object, commenting on its beauty. The figure, identified as Ded Moroz, carrying a sack, stumbles but recovers, running urgently through the snow. He encounters a bandit who taunts him and snatches a white rabbit from a stump. The bandit challenges Ded Moroz, demanding something he knows Ded Moroz needs, and then instructs a Медведь named Мишка to retrieve a lacquered casket from under a snag. The bear growls, taking the crate, as the bandit triumphantly challenges Ded Moroz to a contest of wonders.

Белый кролик.description: Small white rabbit with long ears, standing on hind legs on a snow-covered stump, initially calm, then grabbed by the bandit, appearing startled and vulnerable.

Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапк.description: Boy with light brown hair, wearing a brown coat and white hooded cloak, piloting the rocket; he grips the steering wheel tightly, his expression shifting from focused to alarmed as red sparks fly past the cockpit, visually conveying distress.

Ракета-транспорт.description: A red and black rocket-like vehicle with a curved front and visible cockpit, flying through a starry night sky, emitting sparks and showing signs of distress or damage. A female voice, seemingly from within or narrating its journey, sings about it being a 'steel bird' flying to appear at 'twelve o'clock' for the New Year, pushing its 'engines at full throttle' to meet the 'old New Year'.

Санта-подобный персонаж.description: Tall, elderly figure, identified as Ded Moroz, in a red robe with white fur trim, long white beard, and red hat, carrying a large dark sack; he stumbles, recovers, runs, stops, startled, and gestures in alarm, speaking with an exasperated but firm tone as he tries to reason with the bandit and refers to himself as 'Ded Moroz'.

Изогнутые часы в ледяной стене.description: Large, ornate clock embedded in the icy wall, with a white face and black hands, showing the time as approximately 10:10, surrounded by icicles and glowing faintly, its rapid ticking and chiming sounds emphasizing the urgency of time running out.

Серый кролик.description: Small grey rabbit, following the Santa-like figure closely, appearing curious and attentive, occasionally looking up at him with interest.

Мужчина в чёрном пальто и цилиндре.description: Man in a black coat and top hat, seated in the rocket, holding a flag and appearing to pilot the vehicle with a focused expression. He briefly speaks in a polite male voice, thanking someone for their guidance.

Бандиты в чёрных шляпах.description: One bandit in a brown tunic and orange scarf, with a mischievous, taunting, and demanding tone, stealthily approaching and grabbing the rabbit, then interacting with the bear (whom he calls 'Mishka') and triumphantly raising his arms after handing over a crate, challenging Ded Moroz to a contest.

Медведь.description: Large black bear with a shaggy coat, nicknamed 'Mishka' by the bandit, initially lurking in the shadows, then approaching the bandit, sniffing the crate, and taking it with a growl, appearing aggressive and protective of the item.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a dramatic shot of a red and black rocket-like vehicle, the Ракета-транспорт, hurtling through a starry night sky, emitting sparks and making whirring sounds of distress. Inside, the Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке grips the steering wheel tightly, his expression shifting from focused to alarmed as red sparks fly past the cockpit, while an urgent male voice, accompanied by a whimsical and slightly urgent orchestral score, laments that 'golden cones' are not found here and 'there's little time left.' The scene then transitions to a dimly lit, icy cavern where a tall, elderly figure in a red robe with white fur trim—the Санта-подобный персонаж—interacts with a small Белый кролик. The elder, speaking in a deep, resonant voice, expresses concern, 'It seems the old man is in trouble. Well, where will I find it?' The rabbit, with a higher-pitched, helpful voice, advises him to 'ask the moon' and to let the 'little things glow.' The elder thanks the 'little bunny' and asks it to 'give me your paw.' He then picks up a large, dark sack and walks through the cavern, passing a large, ornate clock, the Изогнутые часы в ледяной стене, embedded in the ice wall, which shows the time as approximately 10:10, its rapid ticking and chiming sounds underscoring the elder's earlier comment about time running out. He continues outside into a snowy forest at night, where he is joined by the Белый кролик and a Серый кролик, who follow him closely. The elder gestures and speaks to them, and the white rabbit holds up a small, glowing object, possibly a magical item. The elder then leaps onto a snow-covered ledge, and the scene shifts to a wide shot of him standing on a snowy cliff under a crescent moon, looking out over the dark, starry sky, addressing the moon directly, 'Moon, crescent moon, show me the paths and roads. Maybe you see from there?' The atmosphere is serene yet mysterious, with the magical orchestral score continuing to build a sense of wonder and anticipation.

The segment opens with a Santa-like figure, dressed in a red robe with white fur trim and a red hat, standing on a cloud in a starry night sky. He gestures toward a mischievous crescent moon, which playfully sprinkles snowflakes from its mouth, reacting with surprise and amusement. During this, the Santa-like figure, speaking in a deep, warm male voice, asks, "Может, знаешь понаслышке, где найти лесное чудо, ёлку, золотые шишки?" (Maybe you know by hearsay, where to find the forest miracle, a fir tree, golden cones?) and then advises, "Вон идёт медвежий след. По нему и топай, дед. Не сходи со следа зверьева, и упрёшься прямо в дерево." (There goes a bear's track. Follow it, old man. Don't stray from the animal's track, and you'll run straight into a tree.) He then turns and walks away as the moon continues to shower snow. The scene transitions to a red and white rocket flying erratically through the starry sky, emitting sparks and showing signs of distress or damage. A man in a black coat and top hat pilots the rocket, waving a flag. A different male voice, possibly the pilot, briefly thanks, "Ну, спасибо за указку, за внимание и за ласку." (Well, thank you for the pointer, for the attention and for the kindness.) The Santa-like figure then responds, "Рад уважить, река. Берегись лесовика!" (Glad to oblige, river. Beware of the forest spirit!). Dramatic music begins as a female voice, seemingly from the rocket, sings about a "steel bird" flying under "starry heavens" and needing to "appear at twelve o'clock" for the New Year, pushing its "engines at full throttle." The scene then shifts to a snowy forest where the Santa-like figure, now on the ground, interacts with two rabbits—a white one holding a glowing object and a grey one following closely. The Santa-like figure gestures toward them, and the white rabbit responds animatedly, creating a moment of gentle interaction in the cold, wintry environment, as the Santa-like figure comments, "Вот уж действительно красавица!" (Now that's truly a beauty!), and the female voice from the rocket briefly says, "Мне по..." (To me...).

A Santa-like figure, dressed in a traditional red robe with white fur trim, a red hat, and a long white beard, runs through a snowy, moonlit forest, carrying a large dark sack over his shoulder. He appears in a hurry, gesturing with his hands as if calling out or warning. He is accompanied by two rabbits, a white one and a grey one, who follow closely, occasionally looking up at him. A child-like female voice, belonging to one of the rabbits, asks in Russian, “Why don't you like it here?”, to which the Santa-like figure, in a deep, booming voice, reassures them, “Don't be afraid, bunny souls! Maybe we won't get lost!” and questions, “Whose jokes are these? I know whose!”. The environment shifts from dense, snow-covered trees to a more open, icy landscape with jagged ice formations and a glowing, crystalline tree, all set to an orchestral, slightly ominous and magical background score. The rabbit's voice then playfully accuses him, “Oh, I don't believe you, you're a coward!”, prompting the Santa-like figure to retort, “And you are terribly brave! Not a coward, you think, but you yourself are white with fear!”. He stops briefly to interact with the rabbits, who respond with animated gestures, the white rabbit even holding a small glowing object. The Santa-like figure continues his journey, climbing a snow-covered hill under a starry sky, his booming voice declaring, “Here you go! Here you go! With me, he'll cope with the frost!” before adding, “Oh, go to hell!”. He pauses at the summit to look around with a concerned expression, as if searching for something or someone, as the magical music continues with a sense of urgency. The atmosphere is cold and magical, with soft snowfall and a deep blue, nocturnal palette dominating the scene, ending with the figure standing atop the hill, gazing into the distance, his posture suggesting urgency and determination.

Under a dark, starry, snowy forest sky, a tall, elderly figure, identified as Ded Moroz, dressed in a red robe with white fur trim and a long white beard, stumbles and falls while carrying a large dark sack. He quickly recovers, brushing snow off himself, and continues running through the snow-covered terrain with urgency, accompanied by a tense, dramatic background score. He encounters a dark, bearded bandit in a brown tunic and orange scarf, who stealthily approaches from behind a tree with a mischievous grin. The bandit suddenly emerges, exclaiming in a taunting voice, "Теперь моя, красавица!" (Now you're mine, beauty!), and grabs a small white rabbit perched on a snow-covered stump, startling the vulnerable creature. Ded Moroz stops, startled, and gestures in alarm. The bandit then challenges Ded Moroz, asking, "Скажи, седая борода, зачем пожаловал сюда?" (Tell me, grey beard, why have you come here?), and declares, "Шутить с тобой мне недосужно. Знаешь сам, чего мне нужно." (I have no time for jokes with you. You know yourself what I need.) Ded Moroz, with an exasperated but firm tone, responds, "Да уж, конечно, знаю сам. Отдай же, дутки!" (Oh, of course, I know myself. Give it back, you rascal!), to which the bandit defiantly replies, "Дай! Не дам!" (Give it! I won't give it!). Ded Moroz calls him "Ты леший, всё-таки чудок." (You're a forest spirit, still a bit strange.) The bandit then turns to a large black bear, whom he calls "Мишка" (Mishka), and hands it a small wooden crate, urging, "А ну-ка, Мишка, вывалакивай из-под коряги ларчик лаковый!" (Hey, Mishka, drag out the lacquered casket from under the snag!). The bear sniffs the crate, then takes it with a growl, appearing aggressive. The bandit raises his arms triumphantly, challenging Ded Moroz, "Давай, старик, поборемся! Давай, старик, поспоримся! Что чудо почудеснее, что диво интереснее!" (Come on, old man, let's wrestle! Come on, old man, let's argue! What's more wondrous, what's more interesting!), signaling his success amidst the cold, foreboding backdrop of snow-covered trees and icy rocks, emphasizing the urgency and danger of the encounter.

event_blocks.summary: In a snowy, starlit forest, a Santa-like figure, accompanied by a grey rabbit, is approached by a bandit in a brown tunic who exclaims, "He's coming, he's coming!" The bandit snatches the white rabbit, prompting the Santa-like figure to confront him. The bandit then hands a crate to a large black bear, which growls and takes it. A mechanical box with orange accents opens with a 'ding' to reveal a decorative plate showing a castle on an island. The bandit taunts, "Come here, look, grey beard! What do you say? Is the miracle good?" The plate zooms in under a cloudy sky. Returning to the forest, the bandit holds a small, glowing object, telling the Santa-like figure, "It's neither good nor bad. Now, brother forest spirit, it's my turn. Now we'll see who wins." The Santa-like figure reacts with surprise. The scene shifts to a snowy cityscape with an ornate building, then a close-up of the Santa-like figure's worried face. The bandit places a glowing device into a box, stating, "You yourself said, let's argue. You yourself are to blame. You have to give up the tree." The Santa-like figure watches as the plate reappears, now showing a snowy landscape with a house and a figure in a red coat. The bandit continues, "You, old man, are too quick. Wait, the argument isn't over. To be fair, look at the second wonder." The final shot returns to the forest, where the distressed Santa-like figure stands with hands out, while the bandit crouches nearby with the box, asking, "Do you see?" Later, a red and white rocket-like vehicle, the Ракета-транспорт, crashes through the snowy forest, emitting sparks and smoke. The Santa-like figure stumbles out and is joined by the bandit, who laughs and exclaims, "Иди отсюда поскорей, с дурацкой птицею, господей!" and threatens, "А ёлку сам тебе срублю и сам зайчатам порублю!". A child-like voice comments, "Ёлочка, действительно, прекрасная! Прекрасная!". The Santa-like figure pulls a Белый кролик from his sack and hands it to the bandit, who accepts it. The bandit produces a crate filled with gold coins, placing it on the snow. A philosophical male voice laments, "Эх ты, сказка-небылица, ни к кому ты не нужна! Новой сказке поклониться, сказка старая должна!", to which another male voice counters, "Так не должен, так не может умный леший говорить! Сказка старая поможет сказку новую творить!". A large black Медведь emerges, sniffs the crate, and snatches it, causing the bandit to recoil. The Santa-like figure, joined by a Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке, climbs back into the rocket, which is now upright and repaired. The boy grips the steering wheel as the rocket lifts off with a whoosh and soaring engine sounds, pursued by the bandit and the bear. The rocket flies into the night sky, leaving a trail of sparks, as the bandit and bear continue their pursuit through the forest, eventually flying high above the snow-covered rooftops of a distant town.

Белый кролик.description: Small white rabbit with long ears, initially held by the Santa-like figure, then handed to the bandit, appearing startled and vulnerable.

Механический ящик.description: Large, ornate box with a mechanical design, featuring orange accents, a circular dial, and a handle; it is covered in frost and appears to be a communication or power device, being dragged through the icy cavern by the Гном-персонаж.

Декоративная тарелка.description: Ornate silver plate with intricate scrollwork and gem-like inlays, featuring a painted scene that changes — first showing a castle on an island with sailboats, then a snowy landscape with a small house and a figure in a red coat; the plate is held within a wooden box lined with red fabric.

Санта-подобный персонаж.description: Tall, elderly figure in a red robe with white fur trim, long white beard, and red hat, initially stumbling from the wreckage, brushing off snow with a concerned expression, and later possibly speaking philosophical lines about fairy tales, then climbing back into the rocket.

Медведь.description: Large black bear with a shaggy coat, emerging from the shadows, sniffing the crate of gold coins, and snatching it with a visual growl, appearing aggressive and protective.

Бандиты в чёрных шляпах.description: One bandit in a brown tunic and orange scarf, with a mischievous expression; he speaks in a higher-pitched, mischievous, and taunting voice, referring to the Santa-like figure as 'Дед Мороз'.

Серый кролик.description: Small grey rabbit, following the Santa-like figure closely, appearing curious and attentive, occasionally looking up at him with interest.

Ракета-транспорт.description: Red and black rocket-like vehicle with a curved front and visible cockpit, initially crashing through the snowy forest with loud engine and crashing sounds, emitting sparks and smoke, then repaired and flying into the night sky with a whoosh and soaring engine sounds.

Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапк.description: Boy with light brown hair, wearing a brown coat and white hooded cloak, piloting the rocket, gripping the steering wheel tightly with a focused expression as the rocket lifts off.

Золото в куче.description: Large pile of gold coins spilled on the forest floor, gleaming faintly in the dim light, serving as the focus of the bandit’s greed and the central object of conflict.

Бандит в чёрных шляпах.description: Mischievous bandit in a brown tunic and orange scarf, crouching near the wreckage, laughing and gesturing excitedly while speaking aggressive lines in a gruff voice about a 'stupid bird' and chopping trees/bunnies, then receiving a crate of gold coins, reacting in surprise when the bear takes it, and possibly engaging in a philosophical debate about old and new fairy tales.

A Santa-like figure in a red robe and long white beard walks with a white and a grey rabbit as a bandit in a brown tunic stealthily approaches, a male voice (the bandit) exclaiming in Russian, "He's coming, he's coming!" The bandit grabs the white rabbit, prompting the Santa-like figure to turn and confront him. The bandit then hands a crate to a large black bear, which sniffs it and takes it with a growl. The music becomes more dramatic as the scene cuts to a close-up of a mechanical box with orange accents, which opens with a 'ding' sound to reveal a decorative plate. The bandit's voice taunts, "Come here, look, grey beard! What do you say? Is the miracle good?" The plate displays a castle on an island, which then zooms in under a cloudy sky. Returning to the forest, the bandit holds a small, glowing object, addressing the Santa-like figure, "It's neither good nor bad. Now, brother forest spirit, it's my turn. Now we'll see who wins." The Santa-like figure reacts with surprise as the bandit presents the object. The music shifts to a more playful, argumentative tone as a bright, snowy cityscape with an ornate building appears, followed by a close-up of the Santa-like figure's worried face. The bandit places a glowing device into a box, stating, "You yourself said, let's argue. You yourself are to blame. You have to give up the tree." The Santa-like figure watches intently as the plate reappears, now showing a snowy landscape with a house and a figure in a red coat. The bandit continues, "You, old man, are too quick. Wait, the argument isn't over. To be fair, look at the second wonder." The final shot returns to the forest, where the distressed Santa-like figure stands with hands out, while the bandit crouches nearby with the box, asking, "Do you see?"

In a snowy, starlit forest at night, a Santa-like figure in a red robe with white fur trim and a long white beard stumbles through the snow, brushing off snow from his hat and coat, accompanied by a small grey rabbit. A whimsical, slightly ominous orchestral score with Russian folk elements plays throughout. A bandit in a brown tunic and orange scarf, with a mischievous grin, approaches, holding a small, ornate mechanical box with a glowing screen. The bandit, in a higher-pitched, taunting voice, exclaims, "Glorious, it goes, bricks warm the back. Good. But not pretty. It will be prettier. And Petrov invented, a locomotive broom. Locomotive! Electric locomotives! That's what Santa Claus will say!" He hands the box to a large black bear, which sniffs it and then growls, taking it with a swipe of its paw. The Santa-like figure gestures urgently, pointing toward a distant, illuminated train whose whistle blows and chugging sounds are heard. The bandit then opens the box, revealing a circular, ornate plate with a painted scene that shifts from a castle on an island to a snowy landscape with a red-coated figure. The Santa-like figure reacts with alarm, and in a deeper, admonishing voice, warns, "Don't rejoice prematurely. The tree isn't yours yet. Look, Tsarevich Vanya is flying on a magic carpet." The bear, now holding the box, turns and runs off into the forest. The bandit, in his mischievous tone, dismisses, "Well, the carpet, at least it's not heavy. These are definitely miracles. It's a sin for me to argue with you. It just looks funny. This miracle is around, around like this!" The scene shifts to a close-up of the plate’s image, showing a red and black rocket-like vehicle flying over a snowy mountain range with a distinct whooshing sound. The Santa-like figure, now visibly distressed, raises his arms in frustration as the bear vanishes into the trees. The bandit, still holding the box, looks triumphant, then suddenly drops it as a white rabbit is snatched from a snow-covered stump by the bear. The Santa-like figure rushes forward, trying to intervene, but the bear flees with the rabbit and the box. The scene ends with the Santa-like figure standing alone in the snow, looking defeated, as the train continues its journey into the distance under a dark, starry sky, its chugging fading.

The scene opens with the red and white rocket-like vehicle, the Ракета-транспорт, crashing through a snowy forest at night with loud engine and crashing sounds, emitting sparks and smoke as it tumbles across the snow-covered ground, causing a small explosion of snow and debris. A Santa-подобный персонаж, dressed in a red robe, stumbles out, brushing snow off his coat with a concerned expression. He is soon joined by a mischievous Бандит в чёрных шляпах, who crouches nearby, laughing and excitedly gesturing, exclaiming in a gruff voice, "Иди отсюда поскорей, с дурацкой птицею, господей!" and threatening, "А ёлку сам тебе срублю и сам зайчатам порублю!". A child-like voice then comments, "Ёлочка, действительно, прекрасная! Прекрасная!", as whimsical, slightly melancholic music begins. The Santa-like figure pulls out a Белый кролик from his sack and hands it to the bandit, who eagerly accepts it. The bandit then produces a crate filled with gold coins, which he places on the snow. A philosophical male voice, likely the Santa-like figure, laments, "Эх ты, сказка-небылица, ни к кому ты не нужна! Новой сказке поклониться, сказка старая должна!", to which another male voice, possibly the bandit, counters, "Так не должен, так не может умный леший говорить! Сказка старая поможет сказку новую творить!". Suddenly, a large black Медведь emerges from the shadows, sniffs the crate, and snatches it with a visual growl, causing the bandit to recoil in surprise. The Santa-like figure, now joined by a young boy in a blue coat, the Мальчик в коричневом пальто и белой шапке, climbs back into the rocket, which is now upright and repaired. The boy grips the steering wheel tightly as the rocket lifts off with a whoosh and soaring engine sounds, accompanied by dramatic, triumphant music. The rocket flies over the snowy landscape with the bandit and the bear chasing after it. The rocket soars into the night sky, leaving a trail of sparks behind, as the bandit and bear continue their pursuit through the forest. The scene ends with the rocket flying high above the snow-covered rooftops of a distant town, the stars shining brightly in the dark sky, as the music fades out.

event_blocks.summary: A red-and-white Ракета-транспорт dramatically crashes through a starry night sky, trailing smoke and sparks before tumbling into a snow-covered, whimsical town, accompanied by an orchestral swell and impact sound. From the wreckage, a Santa-подобный персонаж emerges, brushing snow off his red robe as a whimsical, magical orchestral piece begins. A Белый кролик and a Серый кролик descend with colorful umbrellas, alongside falling toys and gifts. The Santa-подобный персонаж catches the Белый кролик and gestures, while a massive, decorated Рождественская ёлка grows taller as gifts land on its branches, transitioning the music to a festive, grand orchestral piece. The Santa-подобный персонаж climbs the Рождественская ёлка, places final decorations, and stands atop it as the Изогнутые часы в ледяной стене strike midnight with distinct chimes. The fully lit Рождественская ёлка glows, and the Santa-подобный персонаж raises his arms in triumph amidst cheering Фестивальные животные, including the rabbits and a Медведь, who wave and celebrate. The Santa-подобный персонаж joyfully declares in Russian, "Эту ёлку и игрушки я из царства сказок вам привёз. С Новым годом, дорогие дети!", met by an enthusiastic chorus of children's voices responding, "С Новым годом!", enhancing the joyful, magical atmosphere of the illuminated town.

Белый кролик.description: Small white rabbit with long ears, initially held by the Santa-подобный персонаж, then handed to the bandit, appearing startled and vulnerable, later seen celebrating with other animals and contributing to the chorus of children's voices wishing 'Happy New Year!'

Миниатюрный город.description: Surreal, animated miniature town with snow-covered rooftops and cobblestone streets, transitioning from a bright, snowy village to a dark, forested area, serving as the setting for the chase, now shown as a festive, illuminated town under the Christmas tree.

Ракета-транспорт.description: Red and black rocket-like vehicle with a curved front and visible cockpit, initially crashing through the snowy forest with a dramatic impact sound, emitting sparks and smoke, then repaired and flying into the night sky.

Санта-подобный персонаж.description: Tall, elderly figure in a red robe with white fur trim, long white beard, and red hat, initially stumbling from the wreckage, brushing off snow, then climbing back into the rocket with a concerned expression, later seen decorating the Christmas tree and celebrating with animals; speaks with a deep, booming, joyful Russian voice, announcing he brought the tree and toys from a fairy tale kingdom and wishing a Happy New Year.

Декоративная тарелка.description: Ornate silver plate with intricate scrollwork and gem-like inlays, featuring a painted scene that changes — first showing a castle on an island with sailboats, then a snowy landscape with a small house and a figure in a red coat; the plate is held within a wooden box lined with red fabric.

Медведь.description: Large black bear with a shaggy coat, emerging from the shadows, sniffing the crate of gold coins, and snatching it with a growl, appearing aggressive and protective, later seen celebrating with other animals and contributing to the chorus of children's voices wishing 'Happy New Year!'

Изогнутые часы в ледяной стене.description: Large, ornate clock embedded in the icy wall, with a white face and black hands, showing the time as approximately 10:10, surrounded by icicles and glowing faintly, later striking midnight with distinct chimes.

Серый кролик.description: Small grey rabbit, following the Santa-подобный персонаж closely, appearing curious and attentive, occasionally looking up at him with interest, later seen celebrating with other animals and contributing to the chorus of children's voices wishing 'Happy New Year!'

Рождественская ёлка.description: Massive, decorated Christmas tree with green branches, adorned with colorful ornaments, beads, lights, and toys, growing taller as gifts fall onto it, topped with a glowing star, and serving as the centerpiece of the festive celebration, accompanied by grand orchestral music.

Фестивальные животные.description: Group of woodland animals — including rabbits, a bear, and other creatures — gathered around the Christmas tree, waving, cheering, and celebrating with the Santa-подобный персонаж; their collective enthusiasm is represented by a chorus of children's voices responding 'Happy New Year!' to the Santa-подобный персонаж.

raw_segments: The minute opens with a wide, sweeping night view of a snow-covered, whimsical town under a starry sky, as a red-and-white rocket-like vehicle, the Ракета-транспорт, crashes through the air with a dramatic orchestral swell and the sound of its impact, trailing smoke and sparks before tumbling into the town. From the wreckage emerges a Santa-подобный персонаж, a tall, elderly man in a red robe, who stumbles out brushing snow off his coat, accompanied by a whimsical, magical orchestral piece. He is soon joined by a flurry of descending objects, including a white rabbit (Белый кролик) and a grey rabbit (Серый кролик) parachuting down with colorful umbrellas, along with various toys and gifts. The Santa-подобный персонаж catches the white rabbit and gestures as if directing the falling items. The scene shifts to a massive, decorated Christmas tree (Рождественская ёлка), adorned with ornaments, beads, and lights, which grows taller as the falling gifts land on its branches, while the music transitions to a festive and grand orchestral piece. The Santa-подобный персонаж climbs the tree, placing the final decorations, and stands proudly at the top as the clock on a nearby icy tower (Изогнутые часы в ледяной стене) strikes midnight with distinct chimes. The tree is now fully lit, glowing with festive lights, and the Santa-подобный персонаж raises his arms in triumph, surrounded by cheering animals (Фестивальные животные) — including the two rabbits, a bear (Медведь), and other woodland creatures — who wave and celebrate. With a deep, booming, joyful voice, the Santa-подобный персонаж declares in Russian, "Эту ёлку и игрушки я из царства сказок вам привёз. С Новым годом, дорогие дети!" (This tree and toys I brought you from the kingdom of fairy tales. Happy New Year, dear children!), to which a chorus of children's voices enthusiastically responds, "С Новым годом!" (Happy New Year!), amplifying the joyful and magical atmosphere of the snow-covered, radiantly illuminated town.

event_blocks.summary: The Ракета-транспорт crashes through a snowy forest with a "CRASH!" and "BOOM!", emitting sparks and smoke; the Santa-подобный персонаж emerges, brushes off snow, and re-enters the rocket. The scene shifts to a festive celebration under a Рождественская ёлка, where Фестивальные животные, including rabbits and a bear, dance to whimsical music. The Santa-подобный персонаж, holding a белый кролик and a серый кролик, joins the dancing. The Рождественская ёлка grows taller as gifts fall, and a red star glows atop it. The video concludes with 'КОНЕЦ ФИЛЬМА' displayed as the music fades.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a chaotic crash of the Ракета-транспорт through a snowy forest, accompanied by a loud, sharp "CRASH!" and a distinct "BOOM!" as it emits sparks and smoke while tumbling. The Santa-подобный персонаж emerges from the wreckage, brushing off snow and looking dazed, as whimsical, circus-like instrumental music begins to play. He then climbs back into the rocket with a determined expression. The scene transitions to a festive celebration under a massive Рождественская ёлка, adorned with colorful ornaments, lights, and toys, with the whimsical music continuing, now more prominent and joyful. A group of Фестивальные животные — including rabbits, a bear, and other woodland creatures — dance joyfully around the tree, waving and cheering to the festive tune. The Santa-подобный персонаж, now fully recovered, joins the celebration, holding a white кролик and a серый кролик, who are also dancing. The bear, previously aggressive, now dances happily alongside the rabbits as the carousel-like music maintains its joyful, festive tone. The tree grows taller as gifts fall onto it, and the atmosphere remains warm and joyful, with the festive music building in intensity and cheerfulness. The scene culminates with a glowing red star atop the tree, surrounded by beams of light, symbolizing the festive climax, as the music reaches a crescendo of joy. The video ends with the text 'КОНЕЦ ФИЛЬМА' in light blue Cyrillic letters against a black background, marking the conclusion of the film, as the music fades out to silence.
